title: Is there a way to create Milestone report in Monday.com
excerpt: I would like to create a milestone report for a project where it shows planned vs actual timeline only for key milestones and a variance indicator. Is that achievable or any option available.

posts.author: Surabhi (Surabhi Valiyatile)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a milestone report for a project where it shows planned vs actual timeline only for key milestones and a variance indicator. Is that achievable or any option available.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Surabhi ,
I believe utilizing the Gantt Baseline Feature could accomplish what you are looking for. I will link the Monday documentation below that explains how to set this up.

Support

The Gantt Baseline
